awards.title: Graduate Student Conference Travel Award
awards.awarder: Center for the Study of Race, Ethnicity & Equity
awards.summary: The Center for the Study of Race, Ethnicity & Equity will offer a limited number of Graduate Student Conference Travel Grants of up to $1,000 to support conference travel activities related to the advancement of the CRE2 mission, three CRE2 pillars, and the 2020-2023 CRE2 Programmatic Themes.

awards.title: First Place and People's Choice Award
awards.summary: To highlight the talent of graduate students at WashU and our international partners, a Three Minute Thesis (3MT®) competition showcased their research and projects in the four thematic areas for a chance to gain recognition and win cash prizes.

awards.title: Small Grant
awards.awarder: Center for the Study of Race, Ethnicity & Equity
awards.summary: The Center for the Study of Race, Ethnicity & Equity offers a limited number of Small Grants of up to $1,000 to support activities related to the advancement of the CRE2 mission, three CRE2 pillars, and the 2020-2023 CRE2 Programmatic Themes.

publications.name: The Effect of Group Status on the Variability of Group Representations in {LLM}-generated Text
publications.publisher: Socially Responsible Language Modelling Research, NeurIPS 2023
publications.summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) depict socially subordinate groups as less diverse than their dominant counterpart.
